content: Critical: initialize undefined variables in server.py + auth.py
Critical: move auth token to httpOnly cookie (backend sets cookie + reads from cookie/header; frontend drops localStorage token)
Critical: add useCallback for hook deps across all React files
Important: refactor server.py — extract helpers from upload_syllabus, _poll_call, quiz_generate, vapi_webhook, get_call_session
Important: extract ActiveCallPanel to its own file
Important: replace index-based keys with stable IDs
Important: log empty catch blocks; replace nested ternaries with helpers
